label: 第161話
source_locator: 単行本18巻 目次 p.167
summary_short: 虎杖と伏黒は東京第1結界へ入った直後、別々の地点へ転送される。虎杖は羽場・羽生の襲撃を受け、伏黒は麗美と遭遇する。
summary_full: 東京第1結界へ入った虎杖は高所から落とされ、侵入者を狙う羽生の突進を受ける。虎杖は建物を利用して反撃するが、羽生の仲間・羽場も現れる。一方、伏黒は鵺で落下を防ぎ、津美紀を救うため日車の居場所を探す。そこで蠍の尾のような髪を持つ麗美と遭遇し、彼女を制圧して日車まで案内するよう要求する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 悠仁 and 恵 enter the 東京第1結界 together but it's not long before they're unexpectedly separated. Unwillingly transported to distant locations, both are targetted for being rookies to the 死滅回游 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 内部 the 東京第1結界, a woman with aviators and a walkie-talkie named 羽生 stands on top of a skyscraper that overlooks the city. Players inside the colony keeping an eye out for newcomers. 羽生 asks for a signal from someone named 凛 甘井 , a boy she's forcing to work for her. He replies that he can't do anything if no one shows up and this irritates 羽生. She expresses she's annoyed with his response and 凛 gets scared and immediately apologizes. 羽生 activates her 術式 , shaping her hair into the rear of a jet plane, and threatens to run 凛 over if he mouths off. 外 the colony, 悠仁 and 恵 approach the barrier and the latter says they need to be wary of incarnated sorcerers from past eras. 悠仁 acts like he agrees with this but then immediately asks 恵 to run it by him again. 恵 realizes 悠仁 doesn't get it at all and agrees to explain. Some players are from a thousand years ago and even those from only a hundred years ago have completely different mindsets than modern-day people. As sorcerers, they valued life differently and fighting to the death was a normal thing for them. Some people even desired to achieve an honorable end in battle and 恵 thinks that might be why they agreed to become players. 恵 doesn't believe they'll be able to negotiate with past sorcerers and 悠仁 emphasizes they need to be wary of 呪霊 as well, especially at night. 恵's hope is that a modern sorcerer caught up in the game like 津美紀 will be happy to talk. 悠仁 and 恵 enter the barrier. They knock on the barrier wall to the 東京第1結界 and コガネ appears to greet them. コガネ announces that the 死滅回游 is taking place inside and anyone who enters will become a player in the deadly competition. 恵 declares his participation and forgoes reviewing the rules with コガネ. Determined to save his sister, 恵 reminds 悠仁 that their first move is to get information on 日車寛見 . The duo steps inside the barrier and they're suddenly separated, sent to different locations away from one another. 悠仁 falls from the sky and is confused by his circumstances while also wondering where 恵 is. When a player enters the game's barrier, they're transferred to one of nine locations. Certain individuals position themselves at those locations to take advantage of the rookies who are disoriented by circumstances not mentioned in the rules. 凛 notices 悠仁 falling from the sky and plays his role by using a guiding light baton to signal 羽生. 悠仁 gets separated from 恵 and immediately gets targetted for being a newbie. 羽生 uses her 術式 to propel herself and fly at high speed, ramming directly 悠仁. She smashes straight through two buildings – an attack that would've pulverized most players. However, 悠仁 is unscathed and recovers from the impact quickly, surprising 羽生. 悠仁 manages to get some footing by landing on a building and takes his fighting stance. 羽生 recognizes her opponent's toughness and calls her partner to her side. 悠仁 quickly throws a rock that hits Hanya in her lower abdomen. She's seriously hurt and realizes that 悠仁 grabbed debris from the buildings he crashed through and charged it with 呪力. Heavily injured, 羽生 loses altitude and falls into the building below her. 悠仁 is surprised by how easily his adversary was defeated. He still needs to ask about 日車 and find 恵. 羽生's partner, 羽場 , uses his helicopter-like 術式 to levitate behind 悠仁. Angry, he demands to know what 悠仁 has done to his woman. 悠仁 faces his new opponent and decides to ask him about 日車 instead. 凛 notices that 羽場 engaged and that 羽生 went down. He ponders the new player's for a second and finds them familiar before remembering he's someone named 虎杖. 恵 encounters a troublesome girl named 麗美. Meanwhile, 恵 knocks a female player down with his cursed tool drawn. She asks him why he did that and he angrily replies because she attacked him. He laments that he got split but up with 悠仁 and not even 鵺 is able to locate him. This is because the colony is much larger than 渋谷 and the boys are possibly over two kilometers apart now. Regardless, both of them still know what to look for. 恵 asks the girl about the information on 日車 but she acts purposely difficult. She says that she'll only give him the information if he acts as her knight and protects her. 恵 reluctantly agrees but not in a playful way like she wants. He tells her to walk in front and only promises to protect her if she's telling the truth. Otherwise, he implies a punishment that will result in him scoring points. Unlike 悠仁, 恵 has no qualms about racking up one hundred points on his own if need be. Unintimidated, the girl responds with a devious smirk and tells 恵 to call her 麗美.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 羽生 凛 甘井 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 羽場 麗美 伏黒津美紀 (言及のみ)
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 死滅回游 虎杖悠仁 vs. 羽場 & 羽生 (開始) 虎杖悠仁 vs. 羽場 & 羽生 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: Cursed 術式 羽生's Airplane-Hair 術式 羽場's Helicopter-Hair 術式 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 鵺

虎杖が羽生・羽場の襲撃を受ける

verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
